qids.subject: Digital Logic
qids.prose: Consider the following combinational function block involving four Boolean variables are inputs and is the output. f(x, a, b, y) { if(x is 1) y = a; else y = b; } Which one of the following digital logic blocks is the most suitable for implementing this function? A. Full adder B. Priority encoder C.
